name: Crab Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hamburger rolls in half.
2. Butter each half and toast lightly in the broiler.
3. In a bowl, combine crabmeat, onion, pepper, mayonnaise, and Old Bay Seasoning.
4. Spread each of the 8 roll halves thickly with the crabmeat mixture.
5. Place a slice of cheese on top of each roll.
6. Arrange the rolls on a cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a 350 degree oven until the crabmeat is heated through and the cheese is melted.
8. Remove from the oven, place the other half of the roll on top, and serve.
(Note: Eastern Shore crab recipe downloaded from the internet on 8/30/98)
